name: Ava Nakamura
cv_text: Senior backend engineer with 9 years building Python services. Designed FastAPI + PostgreSQL platforms and a production RAG system over a vector database. Strong on data modelling, async I/O, and API contracts. Mentors junior engineers and owns service reliability.
project_history: Led the retrieval platform for a fintech search product
Built an async ingestion pipeline handling 50M documents
Owned the API gateway rewrite that cut p95 latency in half

name: Diego Fuentes
cv_text: Frontend engineer with 7 years in React and TypeScript. Built design systems with Tailwind and shadcn/ui, and accessible dashboards used by enterprise clients. Comfortable owning the whole client stack from build tooling to component libraries.
project_history: Built the internal analytics dashboard used by 400 staff
Created a reusable component library adopted across 6 teams
Led the migration from CRA to Vite

name: Priya Mehta
cv_text: Applied ML engineer focused on NLP and retrieval-augmented generation. Built embedding pipelines and faithfulness evaluation harnesses. Pragmatic about shipping models and measuring grounding quality. Calm under pressure and rigorous about evaluation.
project_history: Built the groundedness eval suite for a customer-support assistant
Tuned a hybrid search ranker that lifted recall by 18 points
Stood up an offline model evaluation pipeline

name: Tomasz Wójcik
cv_text: Platform and DevOps engineer with deep GCP experience. Writes Terraform for Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, and VPC networking, and runs container platforms on Kubernetes. Obsessed with reproducible builds and least-privilege IAM.
project_history: Migrated a monolith to Cloud Run with private-IP Cloud SQL
Built the org's Terraform module library
Set up the CI/CD pipeline with ephemeral preview environments

name: Sarah Okonkwo
cv_text: Product manager with 8 years shipping B2B SaaS. Strong at discovery, stakeholder alignment, and translating ambiguous client needs into scoped roadmaps. Trusted facilitator who keeps cross-functional teams pointed at outcomes.
project_history: Owned the roadmap for a multi-tenant compliance product
Ran discovery for a new analytics line that became 30% of revenue

name: Liang Chen
cv_text: Data engineer with 6 years building batch and streaming pipelines. Strong SQL and Python, orchestrates with Airflow, and has scaled ETL on Spark. Currently fully allocated to a long-running data-platform migration.
project_history: Built the warehouse ingestion layer for a retail analytics platform
Migrated nightly batch jobs to Airflow with full lineage
Optimised a Spark pipeline to cut runtime by 40%
